name: Psarosoupa
method: In a wide saucepan over medium heat, combine the carrots, fennel,
leek, garlic, onions, coriander seeds, and tarragon stalks, as well as
Fill a new pot with the stock and strain the vegetables through a fine
sieve onto a plate, removing the peppercorns and tarragon stalks.
Return half of the vegetables to the stock and smash with a fork.
Enable the soup to rise to a boil before adding the olive oil and
Cook for 20-30 minutes before adding the lime juice.
Remove from the heat after stirring.
Put the cooked vegetables and fish parts in individual bowls with the
soup and serve right away, coated with finely grated parmesan.
